title: cyrtandra mooreaensis
intro: Cyrtandra mooreaensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the island cyrtandra. It is native to the island of Moorea in French Polynesia and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyrtandra mooreaensis include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used topically as poultices or creams.
